name: Example Site
description: A small business website with services and blog posts

chunks.content: We are a small business providing web development services since 2015. Our team specializes in building fast, accessible websites for local businesses.
We believe in using open source tools and transparent pricing. Every project includes ongoing support and maintenance options.
Our web design service includes custom layouts, mobile responsiveness, and SEO optimization. Prices start at $2000 for a basic business website.
Every project includes up to 5 rounds of revisions, a content management system, and training on how to update your own content.

sections.title: We Are Now Open for Business

chunks.content: After months of preparation, we are excited to announce that our web design studio is now accepting new clients. We focus on fast-loading, accessible websites built with modern tools.
Our first project is a complete redesign for a local restaurant including online ordering integration and an events calendar.
What payment methods do you accept? We accept bank transfers, credit cards, and PayPal. A 50% deposit is required to begin work, with the balance due upon completion.
